title: voice_start_session
description: Open a Realtime API voice session. Mic + speakers are bound to the host machine.

voice.description: OpenAI Realtime voice id (alloy, echo, shimmer, verse, ash, coral, ballad, sage, ...). Defaults to 'alloy'.

system_prompt.description: Optional instructions shaping the model's persona/behavior.

on_user_transcript_target.description: Surface to forward final user-speech transcripts to (e.g. 'nexus_agent.inbox'). Fire-and-forget.

on_user_transcript_node.description: Alternative to on_user_transcript_target — name of a node whose .inbox surface should receive transcripts.

on_assistant_transcript_target.description: Optional surface to forward the model's spoken transcript to.
